Patch Set 1:

(4 comments)

The patch looks good functionally, but I'm not enthused at the function name.  I think there is a bit of a mismash of naming conventions, but I think "llapi_create_volatile_*" names are the worst of the bunch.

We need to keep them for API/ABI compatibility, but I'd prefer "open" instead of "create", and follow the "llapi_layout_*" convention (and in general "noun_verb" naming instead of "verb_noun").  We can have wrappers for compatibility with existing functions, but I'd rather not keep going further down the "llapi_create_volatile_*" road.

parents.subject: LU-17305 obdclass: do not link all exports to obd's timed list

commit.subject: LU-18842 lustreapi: create volatile file with a layout
commit.message:
LU-18842 lustreapi: create volatile file with a layout

Adds a new function to lustreapi to create a volatile function with a
layout. This refactors existing volatile functions so more code is
shared between volatile file implementations.

A new test is added to llapi_layout_test.c

Test-Parameters: testlist="sanity" env=ONLY="27D 154g 185 185a 185b 187b 243",ONLY_REPEAT=20
Signed-off-by: Robert Read <rread@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I5aed4c9bbd886b40be0e2d6fcbee64996c4bb399
